cover_illustration.alt: A bright rainbow arching over green hills after the rain
cover_illustration.svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 200 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><rect width='200' height='200' fill='#E3F2FD'/><rect x='0' y='140' width='200' height='60' fill='#66BB6A'/><path d='M10,150 Q100,20 190,150' fill='none' stroke='#F44336' stroke-width='10'/><path d='M18,152 Q100,32 182,152' fill='none' stroke='#FF9800' stroke-width='10'/><path d='M26,154 Q100,44 174,154' fill='none' stroke='#FFEB3B' stroke-width='10'/><path d='M34,156 Q100,56 166,156' fill='none' stroke='#4CAF50' stroke-width='10'/><path d='M42,158 Q100,68 158,158' fill='none' stroke='#2196F3' stroke-width='10'/><path d='M50,160 Q100,80 150,160' fill='none' stroke='#9C27B0' stroke-width='10'/><circle cx='40' cy='30' r='15' fill='white' opacity='0.9'/><circle cx='65' cy='22' r='18' fill='white' opacity='0.9'/><circle cx='90' cy='20' r='20' fill='white' opacity='0.9'/><circle cx='115' cy='22' r='18' fill='white' opacity='0.9'/><circle cx='140' cy='28' r='16' fill='white' opacity='0.9'/></svg>

illustration.alt: Dark storm clouds with rain falling on a neighborhood

illustration.alt: A vivid rainbow with all seven colors stretching across a blue sky

illustration.alt: Light passing through a raindrop to make rainbow colors
illustration.svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 300 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><rect width='300' height='200' fill='#E8EAF6'/><circle cx='80' cy='100' r='35' fill='#B3E5FC' opacity='0.8' stroke='#29B6F6' stroke-width='2'/><line x1='30' y1='80' x2='75' y2='95' stroke='#FFD600' stroke-width='8'/><line x1='30' y1='90' x2='75' y2='100' stroke='#FFD600' stroke-width='8'/><line x1='30' y1='100' x2='75' y2='105' stroke='#FFD600' stroke-width='8'/><line x1='112' y1='80' x2='270' y2='60' stroke='#F44336' stroke-width='5'/><line x1='113' y1='90' x2='270' y2='80' stroke='#FF9800' stroke-width='5'/><line x1='114' y1='100' x2='270' y2='100' stroke='#FFEB3B' stroke-width='5'/><line x1='114' y1='110' x2='270' y2='120' stroke='#4CAF50' stroke-width='5'/><line x1='113' y1='120' x2='270' y2='140' stroke='#2196F3' stroke-width='5'/><line x1='112' y1='130' x2='270' y2='160' stroke='#9C27B0' stroke-width='5'/></svg>

rainbow.definition: An arc of colors in the sky caused by sunlight and rain

violet.definition: A purple-blue color; the last color of the rainbow

refraction.definition: When light bends as it passes through water or glass
